name: gemini-obsidian
description: Obsidian Vault integration with local RAG capabilities
instructions: Use these tools to interact with the user's Obsidian vault. You can read notes, list files, search (fuzzy), create/append notes, get daily notes, and use RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) to answer questions based on the notes. Always check if a vault path is known; if not, ask the user to provide it or set the OBSIDIAN_VAULT_PATH environment variable. You can also use workspace-isolated storage by providing a workspace_path for RAG indexing and queries.
